title: Bitcrushed Minecraft
description: This Resource Pack bitcrushes Everything in Minecraft. Its like deepfried minecraft but different and actually playable.
body:
This is a cursed Minecraft Resource Pack which will turn bitcrush all sounds and audio. This is similar to deep fried minecraft, but it wont rip your ears off.

It is pretty cursed, and some things really were not made for this, but other parts of the world look really cool, so have fun exploring!

This affects animations, blocks, items, entities, sounds, and everything else!

Showcase vid: [https://youtu.be/7pd80s1nU5o](https://youtu.be/7pd80s1nU5o)
